description: Legal document, deed of acknowledgment,  concerning an inheritance dispute between Jamīla bt. Lāḥiq the veterinarian and her brother. Contains three testimonies at the bottom. The document is dated to the first half (niṣf al-awwal) of Rabīʿ II 467 H, which is right after the shidda ʿuzmā (454 - 465 H/ 1062 - 1073 CE), testifying to the restoration of legal and administrative order in the Fatimid empire following the massive famine period. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי, שטר הודאה, על סכסוך ירושה בין ג'מילה בת לאחיק הוטרינר לאחיה, ראשית רביע II 467 ה'
